creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
It does not suffice to add the patch (I used the one from https://code.google.com/p/openvpn-auth-ldap/issues/detail?id=31#c16) and to add USE_AUTOTOOLS=autoconf - the configure script then complains that it does not find a working runtime. Even if I remove the =GNU stuff.

This needs assistance from someone skilled with Objective-C porting.
